news.title: Wabtec (NYSE:WAB) Exceeds Q2 CY2026 Expectations
news.summary: Rail equipment company Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (NYSE:WAB) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 17.5% year on year to $3.18 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $12.45 billion at the midpoint came in 0.6% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.76 per share was 5.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
